title: Viners Barware Gold Double Wall Ice Bucket, 1.3 L
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our double-wall wine cooler is indispensable for any entertainer at home. Keep your bottle cold and insulated in this stylish ice container, ready to serve chilled drinks on any occasion.

SIZE | This Viners bottle cooler comes with an insulating layer, designed to keep your bottle cool straight from the chiller or fridge without leaving water rings. It has a 1.3 litre capacity, and is 18 centimetres in height x 12 centimetres width.

SATIN GOLD | Made from fine quality steel, our bottle cooler is strong, and has a mirror-polished interior with a satin brushed gold effect on the exterior. Please note this item is hand wash only without abrasive sponges. Please wash before first use.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and ice buckets.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine-quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Ice Tongs Bottle Stopper Double Wall Wine Cooler Champagne Bucket 4L Round Silicone Ice Mould Giftbox Ice Tongs Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.6 out of 5 stars 115 4.5 out of 5 stars 34 5.0 out of 5 stars 4 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 Price £2.25 £ 2 . 25 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 £14.48 £ 14 . 48 — no data £11.18 £ 11 . 18 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 Description Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit. The triangular shaped stainless steel bottle stopper with rubber sealing rings will create an air tight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes, keeping the contents fresher for longer. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting. Ideal for Whiskey, Bourbon and Scotch. Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit.
